official_sources.authority_note: Official binary source for the null/null stop_sound fixture body.
Official binary source for the Play clientbound packet table and stop_sound packet id.

field_notes.scope: This fixture proves only the flags byte 0 body. It does not prove SoundSource enum ids or named sound Identifier bodies.

stop_boundary: Proves Play clientbound stop_sound framing and dispatch/decode for the null/null flags byte 0 fixture only; do not infer named source or named sound variants.
